catalog_content:
Item Name: Natural Heaven Hearts of Palm Rice, White - Low-Carb and Low-Calorie White Rice, Keto, Paleo, Plant-Based Healthy Food, Ready to Eat, 9 Oz Ea (Pack of 6) Bullet Point 1: HEARTS OF PALM RICE, WHITE: Natural Heaven White Rice is a fully cooked food you can enjoy in minutes; include our convenient 6-pack in your pantry staples. Bullet Point 2: CAULIFLOWER RICE ALTERNATIVE: Our naturally gluten-free hearts of palm white rice looks and tastes like traditional rice; great for making delicious healthy meals. Bullet Point 3: LOW CALORIE & LOW-CARB RICE: One cup of rice has 45g of carbs and over 200 calories, one cup of Natural Heaven Rice made with hearts of palm has only 4g of net carbs and 50 calories. Bullet Point 4: EASY TO PREPARE: In under five minutes, this fully cooked ready-to-eat rice is perfect for creating tasty healthy snacks, easy side dishes, or delicious main courses. Bullet Point 5: MADE FROM THE HEART, FOR YOURS: Our company was created out of a son’s love for his father to help others thrive with happier, healthier hearts. Product Description:

Comfort food that’s low carb? Yes!

Natural Heaven Hearts of Palm Rice is a delicious heart-healthy alternative to traditional rice that will satisfy all your food cravings with only 2g net carbs per half cup serving. Crafted from the tender hearts of sustainably harvested palm trees, this keto- and vegan-friendly rice offers a satisfying texture to complement all your favorite recipes.

Why choose Natural Heaven Hearts of Palm Rice?

Healthful Indulgence: Our rice is low in calories and carbohydrates, making it an excellent healthy choice for everyone.

Gluten-Free Goodness: Perfect for individuals with gluten sensitivities or those following a gluten-free diet.

Naturally Nutrient-Rich: Packed with vitamins, minerals, and fiber, hearts of palm are delicious and nutritious.

Sustainability Matters: Our hearts of palm are sustainably sourced and promote economic stability for indigenous farmers.

Value: 54.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium plant-based rice alternative positioned for health-conscious consumers with strong keto, paleo, and gluten-free appeal. Sustainable sourcing and certifications justify mid-to-high price point. Convenient multi-pack and ready-to-eat format add value. Brand emphasizes heart health and natural ingredients, supporting premium positioning.
